params.prompt:
[Sources: web]

Use browser automation. Open https://github.com/trending and return 5 repositories with language and one-line description.

details.summary: Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).

entries.title: Trending repositories on GitHub today · GitHub

details.summary: Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).
Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).
Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).
Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).
Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).
Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).

result.final_answer: <answer>Here are the top 5 trending repositories on GitHub today[web:2]: - **ruvnet / RuView** - Language: Rust - Description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video. - **K-Dense-AI / claude-scientific-skills** - Language: Python - Description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing. - **moeru-ai / airi** - Language: TypeScript - Description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported. - **CodebuffAI / codebuff** - Language: TypeScript - Description: Generate code from the terminal! - **agentscope-ai / agentscope** - Language: Python - Description: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust. <answer></answer>

details.summary: Provider tool loop ready with 8 tool(s).

result.final_answer: <answer>Here are the top 5 trending repositories on GitHub today[web:2]: - **ruvnet / RuView** - Language: Rust - Description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video. - **K-Dense-AI / claude-scientific-skills** - Language: Python - Description: A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing. - **moeru-ai / airi** - Language: TypeScript - Description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported. - **CodebuffAI / codebuff** - Language: TypeScript - Description: Generate code from the terminal! - **agentscope-ai / agentscope** - Language: Python - Description: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust. <answer></answer>

params.prompt:
[Sources: web]

Use browser automation to create a quick vendor proposal: open https://asana.com, https://notion.so, and https://trello.com, extract one-sentence positioning and one visible pricing claim (or say pricing not visible) for each, then output a comparison table and recommend one tool for a 10-person startup.
